arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are increasingly looking to Ligue 1 for talent, having added players like Bradley Barcola and Ousmane Dembele over the past two summers. arts.ttl: Virgil Van Dijk Drops One-Word Description on What Liverpool Needed to Do Against PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool edged past Paris Saint-Germain with a 1-0 win Wednesday at Parc des Princes in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League Round of 16 matchup. Moreover, Virgil van Dijk summed up the challenge of facing the French giants in just one word. PSG had plenty of chances but couldn’t make them count.
